textPlain: Related:The almost-lost art of rosin potatoes - https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=41991352 - Oct 2024 (168 comments)

I nearly re-submitted that a few weeks ago.It’s an American delicacy I would love to try, but here in New Zealand I can’t find a local manufacturer of pine rosin that will sell to consumers, and no idea if modern processing of rosin is more risky than it was back when it was on Cracker Barrel menus.
